name: wren-mcp
description: Local stdio MCP server that lets an AI assistant read a Wren notes folder (Build with Baker).
author: Adam Baker / Build with Baker

scripts.inspect: npm run build && npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node dist/index.js
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm prune --omit=dev && npx @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack . Wren.mcpb && npm install
